---
title: "project proposal"
format: pdf
execute: 
  message: false
  warning: false
---

# 1. Set up

## Packages

```{r}
#| label: packages

# general use and cleaning
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(janitor)
library(snakecase)

# wrap axis labels
library(scales)

# read .xlsx files
library(readxl)

# visualize missing data
library(naniar)

# arrange plots
library(patchwork)

```


## Data

```{r}
#| label: data

# taxonomic information
taxon_list <- read_csv(here("data", "taxon_list.csv"))

# aquatic invertebrates
aq_ins <- read_xlsx(
  here("data", "Aquatic Sampling Data-2026-03-10.xlsx"),
  sheet = "Aquatic Insects"
)
```
